# Baltimore Aircoil Company

**Category:** Liquid Cooling, Immersion Cooling, HVAC and Thermal Rejection
**Website:** https://baltimoreaircoil.com/data-centers

## Headline
Heat rejection and thermal infrastructure specialist supporting liquid cooling, immersion, and dense data center deployments.

## Overview
BAC fits the market map as a thermal-rejection and facility-cooling player rather than a rack-level novelty vendor. It helps round out the cooling taxonomy by covering the outside-the-rack heat-rejection layer that becomes more important as liquid cooling adoption rises.

## Key capabilities
- heat rejection systems
- facility-level thermal infrastructure
- support for liquid and immersion cooling environments

## Best fit for
- buyers mapping the full cooling chain
- facility teams planning dense AI heat rejection
- projects where external thermal systems are a gating factor
